temporal_description: A close-up, over-the-shoulder shot shows a man with short, graying hair in a dimly lit, greenish-hued environment. He is wearing a light-colored collared shirt and holds an old-style flip phone to his ear, listening intently. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The audio features a tense phone conversation between two men. The first man speaks in a calm, slightly weary tone, as if he's been waiting for an update. He begins with a direct address, "Chen Ge." The camera cuts to a medium shot of a different man standing outdoors at night. He has dark hair and is dressed in a black jacket. He is also on the phone, holding it to his ear with a serious expression. He is positioned next to a dark car, with the open door visible. The background is dark, with the silhouette of trees and a single streetlight providing some illumination. The same "风行网" watermark is present in the upper left corner. The second man responds with a quick, matter-of-fact "Zha da le" (Found it). The first man continues, his voice taking on a slightly challenging and provocative edge as he asks, "Zha A Qiang dian dian huo, gou bu gou fen lei?" (Go find A Qiang and light him a cigarette, is that too much?). His tone then shifts to become more urgent and cautionary as he instructs, "Kan qing lu dou you you mei you jing cha?" (See if there are any police on the road?). The background is quiet, with only the faint, ambient sounds of a still night, emphasizing the seriousness of the phone call.
